items: If you have public comment related to a study session item, please post it on: (https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSd3rKbPfVCTpOsK5ILqjnU2u-h-NuNx-vUq4OZxYNVR8lc4aQ/viewform?usp=sf_link) prior to the Regular Board Meeting or immediately upon the meeting opening.
Update on Workforce Housing at 750 Bradford Street

llmResponse.agenda_changes: At the start of the meeting, the board president announced changes to the agenda: moving items 10.5, 10.6, and 10.7 (three measure U's) to consent; and moving items 10.3 and 10.4 to consent. These changes were moved, seconded, and approved before proceeding with the agenda.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: Recommendation regarding approval of bundle program consent items. Recommendation of approval measure T, bond program tracking list of items, and recommendation of approval of the MUB transfer switch installation proposal for various sites. Do I have a motion to approve all those three?
